message: No action needed: The triggering push (commit ded185d2b, PR #58177) is an automated bot commit that bumps the TypeSpec http-client-csharp toolchain version to prerelease 1.0.0-alpha.20260415.3 and regenerates all SDK packages. It introduces no new user-facing features, APIs, or types that would require documentation updates. All existing packages already have READMEs, CHANGELOGs, and samples in place.
